vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely non-representative of the current visual data. P1 (String of Nickels) is not visible in the yellow pot. P2 (Mexican Mint) and P4 (Silver Guest) are not identifiable as distinct specimens in the black pots. P3 (Pothos) is absent; the white rabbit anchor is present but the plant is not.

inventory_reconciliation.P1: Systemic Loss (Yellow pot appears empty/soil only)
inventory_reconciliation.P3: Systemic Loss (White rabbit anchor present, but host plant Pothos is missing)
inventory_reconciliation.P4: Systemic Loss (No identifiable silver guest foliage)

plant_audit.P1_Yellow_Pot: Empty soil surface; no botanical growth detected.
plant_audit.P2_Black_Pot: Contains soil and debris; no mint or silver guest foliage.
plant_audit.P3_Black_Pot: Contains white rabbit anchor; no Pothos foliage present.
plant_audit.P4_Shared_Pot: Integrated with P2; no evidence of plant life.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Consistently dark and damp across all pots.
biome_observations.surface_debris: Presence of white granular material (likely perlite or eggshell fragments) in the black pots.
biome_observations.anomalies: A metallic spoon is introduced in T-3 and remains through CURRENT. A white cylindrical object (possibly a sensor or tube) is present in the yellow pot.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_t4: Initial state shows empty pots with minimal debris.
temporal_deltas.t4_to_t2: Introduction of a metallic spoon and a sensor/tube device into the yellow pot.
temporal_deltas.t2_to_current: No biological growth observed; the biome remains static and devoid of the registered plant species.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is currently in a state of 'Biological Stasis' or 'Systemic Failure'. There is no evidence of the registered plants. The environment appears to be maintained as a sterile or failed experimental setup.
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a complete absence of the expected botanical specimens. The pots, while containing soil and some structural markers (rabbit anchor, sensor, spoon), show no signs of the Pothos, Mexican Mint, String of Nickels, or Silver Guest. The environment appears to be a dormant or failed cultivation attempt.
